indexes.def: CREATE INDEX idx_posts_trending_optimized ON public.posts USING btree (created_at DESC, listens_count DESC, saves_count DESC, shares_count DESC, audience_type, is_expired) WHERE (((audience_type)::text = 'public'::text) AND ((is_expired = false) OR (is_expired IS NULL)))
indexes.name: idx_posts_trending_optimized

table_comment: User profiles extending Supabase Auth with social features

columns.name: handle
columns.comment: Unique username for mentions and profile URLs

columns.name: dob
columns.comment: Date of birth for age verification. Migrated from preferences.age_verified for existing users.

columns.name: has_completed_onboarding
columns.comment: Indicates if user has completed the onboarding flow including contact sync

columns.name: timezone
columns.comment: User timezone for feature scheduling (e.g., Sunday recording disable)

columns.name: onboarding_metadata
columns.comment: Tracks onboarding steps completion and preferences

columns.name: recording_credits
columns.comment: Number of 2-minute recording credit blocks available for the user

indexes.def: CREATE INDEX idx_users_activity ON public.users USING btree (followers_count DESC NULLS LAST, posts_count DESC NULLS LAST) WHERE (posts_count > 0)
indexes.name: idx_users_activity

indexes.def: CREATE INDEX idx_users_created_at ON public.users USING btree (created_at DESC)
indexes.name: idx_users_created_at

indexes.name: idx_users_display_name

indexes.name: idx_users_followers_active

indexes.name: idx_users_followers_count

indexes.def: CREATE INDEX idx_users_handle ON public.users USING btree (handle)
indexes.name: idx_users_handle

indexes.def: CREATE INDEX idx_users_onboarding ON public.users USING btree (has_completed_onboarding) WHERE (has_completed_onboarding = false)
indexes.name: idx_users_onboarding

indexes.name: users_handle_key

indexes.name: users_pkey
